## Phase

Implements: **PHASE X** (e.g. Phase 1, Phase 4, Phase 9)

## Description

Brief summary of what this PR does and why. Reference the spec section if relevant.

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch name matches `BRANCH_NAMING.md` format
- [ ] Commit messages match `COMMIT_CONVENTIONS.md` format (type + phase scope + description)
- [ ] Code follows `CODING_CONVENTIONS.md` (types, folder structure, naming)
- [ ] Implementation matches the spec's phase section exactly
- [ ] "Done when" criteria from the spec are actually met (tested in browser)
- [ ] No commits mix multiple phases
- [ ] No unnecessary libraries added
- [ ] All TypeScript types are properly defined in `src/types/`

## Testing

Describe how you verified the "Done when" criteria:
- (e.g. "Ran the game locally, moved the snake with arrow keys, ate pellets, collided with self")

## Screenshots / Demo

If visual, include a screenshot or describe the behavior.
